title: Xtra Cheesy Brazilian Skirt Steak Skewers
description: A resinous and adventurous Brazilian dish featuring skirt steak, lardons, and a rich cheese pull, this recipe is shojin-friendly and perfect for those looking to try something new.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the skirt steak and lardons onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
While the skewers are cooking, mix the mozzarella and parmesan cheese in a bowl.
After the skewers have cooked, place them on a baking sheet and top with the cheese mixture.
Place the baking sheet under the broiler and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
